meta.title: World’s First CIVILIAN F-16 Dogfight
meta.description:
Ride along for a flight in the first civilian F-16 with Hasard Lee as they fly in the aggressor role. Captured in 4K UHD, & 360° with full radio communications. And for 100 free blades with a Henson Razor, check out http://hensonshaving.com/hasard 

The 2023 Bestselling Fighter Pilot Book in the country: https://static.macmillan.com/static/smp/art-of-clear-thinking/


Every 100th person wins a PATCH  👉  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway


📷 Produced by: Hasard Lee, Trey Eaton, Michael Cunningham, Josh Hack 

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
All platforms: @hasardlee

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen

If you're an organization that would like to partner on a video, reach out to hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

Key Moments:
Takeoff - 02:06
Beyond Visual Range Fight - 06:46
Where is this jet from? - 08:56
1000mph Merge - 10:02
Advanced Avionics Demo - 14:16
Aerobrake Explanation - 17:01
